summary: Completed testing of Remote Login / Session Sync feature for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 12). All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Session sync endpoints (sync-session, sync-status, sync-stop, sync-qr) work correctly with proper authentication. Frontend modal opens with QR icon and Start Sync button. Regression tests confirm existing features (health, live-feed, dashboard, bot-logs) still work.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/sync-qr has NO auth (for usage)
GET /api/csdrop/sync-status returns expected fields (status, qr_available, logs, session_exists, session_last_updated)
GET /api/csdrop/sync-status returns idle/finished when no sync in progress
POST /api/csdrop/sync-stop returns error when no sync in progress
GET /api/csdrop/sync-qr returns 404 when no QR available
POST /api/csdrop/sync-session rejects if bot is already running
Full sync flow: start -> status shows 'syncing' -> stop -> status changes
Frontend: 'Sync Session' button visible in Sovereign Bot tab
Frontend: Modal has QR icon and 'Start Sync' button
Frontend: Code Runner tab still works
Frontend: System Health panel shows 'ALL SYSTEMS GO'
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing CSDROP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Sync feature fully functional. Endpoints: POST /api/csdrop/sync-session (starts sync, requires CSDROP auth), GET /api/csdrop/sync-status (polls status/logs, requires CSDROP auth), POST /api/csdrop/sync-stop (cancels sync, requires CSDROP auth), GET /api/csdrop/sync-qr (serves QR image, NO auth for ). Frontend has SyncSessionModal component with QR display, countdown timer, and sync logs. sovereign.py has login_mode() function that handles --login flag for QR code capture. Note: Full Discord QR flow cannot be tested end-to-end (requires Discord mobile app), but all API endpoints and UI components work correctly.
